task.title: Persist character voice knowledge from segment personas
task.objective: Add a narrow persistent persona profile layer so discovered segment personas retain an aggregate voice description and segment count for later voice mapping and packaging inspection.
acceptance_criteria: Use strict TDD: first add a repository test proving persona profiles can be saved, merged from segments, listed, and retrieved by book ID.
Add a small types.PersonaProfile model with book ID, persona ID, stable display name/voice description, segment count, and updated timestamp JSON fields.
Extend the book.Repository interface and StorageRepository with SavePersonaProfiles, GetPersonaProfiles, and UpdatePersonaProfilesFromSegments methods stored under books/<bookID>/personas.json.

Merging from segments must deduplicate personas by segment.Person, increment segment counts, preserve existing non-empty voice descriptions unless a persona has no description yet, and ignore empty persona IDs.
Do not change provider interfaces, parser/OCR behavior, frontend API contracts, or remotes.
task.stop_condition: Stop after this bounded repository/types persona profile persistence slice and summary; do not implement UI for the knowledge base or parser/OCR.
validation: If go exists: go test ./internal/book; otherwise record blocked
